title: One Free "Test" account

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to suggest that there be one (1) Free test account included with the Enterprise and Pro versions.

We are currently using a paid license for a generic test account. We change this account from Owner, to Member, to Viewer so we can see exactly what happens as we make changes to our platform.

This is especially helpful when creating new automations. We want to see what happens before actually turning it on for all users.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Alongside this, I think an enterprise account or pro accounts over a certain size should include one additional license as a “service account” where an automation expert can create all the automations and integrations. This way its not tied to an employee whose account may be deactivated. While there are methods to transfer some of this - its not painless esp. for integrations.
